ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Illustrium Mulierum Et Illustrium Litteris Virorum Elogis
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: A Iulio Caesare Capacio Neapolitanae urbi à Secretis conscripta.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: On p. 375, the author mentions Giavanni Pontano and the Pontaniana Academy in Naples.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Imprimatur. Petrus Ant. Ghibertus Locumtenens. MAgister Cornelius Tiroboscus Ordinis Praed. Curiae Archipiscopalis Theologus vidit. M. Chrysost. Marasca Carmelita dep. vidit.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
